nasb.text: The Lord will make you the head and not the tail, and you only will be above, and you will not be underneath, if you listen to the commandments of the Lord your God, which I charge you today, to observe them carefully,

esv.text: And the Lord will make you the head and not the tail, and you shall only go up and not down, if you obey the commandments of the Lord your God, which I command you today, being careful to do them,

cnv.text: 耶和華必使你作頭不作尾，居上不居下，只要你聽從耶和華你的　神的誡命，就是我今日吩咐你的，謹守遵行；
